emojis.title: Very Demure
emojis.description: You're keeping your screen time modest and mindful. We love to see it.

emojis.title: Bombastic Side Eye
emojis.description: We saw you open the app again. We are judging you respectfully.

emojis.title: Brain Is Melting
emojis.description: Your neurons are liquefying from too much short-form content.

emojis.title: Clown Activity
emojis.description: Honk honk. That's the sound of you opening this app again.

emojis.title: Walking Red Flag
emojis.description: If your screen time was a dating profile, everyone would swipe left.

emojis.title: Entering Goblin Mode
emojis.description: Feral. Unwashed. Consuming content in a dark room. Is this you?

emojis.title: Down Bad Tremendously
emojis.description: You are at rock bottom. The only way is up (by closing the app).

emojis.title: NPC Energy
emojis.description: Non-Playable Character. You are just background noise in the simulation.

emojis.title: Belongs in the Bin
emojis.description: This session is trash. Dispose of it properly by closing the app.

emojis.title: Bro Is Cooked
emojis.description: Overdone. Burnt. Charcoal. There is no saving you now.

emojis.title: Protect Your Peace
emojis.description: Don't let the chaos of the feed disturb your zen right now.

emojis.title: Caught in 4K
emojis.description: We have high-definition proof that you are procrastinating.

emojis.title: Speed: 0
emojis.description: You are moving through your tasks at the pace of a lethargic snail.

emojis.title: The Whole Circus
emojis.description: You're not just a clown, you're the entire entertainment industry.

emojis.title: It's Giving Addiction
emojis.description: The vibes are not good. The vibes are chemical dependency.

emojis.title: Rat Behavior
emojis.description: Scurrying around the internet looking for crumbs of dopamine.

emojis.title: Drooling Over Pixels
emojis.description: Wipe your mouth. You're staring at a screen like it's a gourmet meal.

emojis.title: Smooth Brain
emojis.description: All the wrinkles in your brain have flattened out. No thoughts left.

emojis.title: Absolute Dog Water
emojis.description: Your willpower is currently liquid and smells terrible.

emojis.title: Here Lies Potential
emojis.description: It died somewhere between the 400th and 500th video.

emojis.title: Touch Some Grass?
emojis.description: Nature is calling. It misses you. Go say hello to a plant.

emojis.title: Make It Make Sense
emojis.description: Why are you here? You said you were busy. Explain yourself.

emojis.title: Mid Behavior
emojis.description: This scrolling session is mediocre at best. You can do better.

emojis.title: Played Yourself
emojis.description: You thought you could handle it, but you couldn't. tragic.

emojis.title: Police Are On The Way
emojis.description: The productivity police have been dispatched to your location.

emojis.title: Go Outside Pls
emojis.description: Your skin needs Vitamin D. You are beginning to look translucent.

emojis.title: Touch Grass Now
emojis.description: This is an emergency order. Find vegetation and interact with it.

emojis.title: Rotmaxxing
emojis.description: Optimizing your life for maximum brain rot. A bold, terrible strategy.

emojis.title: Skibidi Cringe
emojis.description: Please stop. Even the memes are embarrassed for you right now.

emojis.title: Ghosting Life
emojis.description: You have officially become a phantom in the real world.

emojis.title: Main Character Energy
emojis.description: You control the algorithm, the algorithm doesn't control you.

emojis.title: Stop The Cap
emojis.description: You're lying to yourself if you say 'just one more video'.

emojis.title: Stonks Are Down
emojis.description: Your attention span value is crashing in the stock market of life.

emojis.title: Mask Off Moment
emojis.description: Revealing the true procrastinator underneath. We see you.

emojis.title: Major Ick
emojis.description: This lack of self-control is honestly a little bit repulsive.

emojis.title: Chronically Online
emojis.description: You understand memes that nobody in the real world understands.

emojis.title: Addiction Final Boss
emojis.description: You have reached the final level of wasted time. There is no prize.

emojis.title: Hard Pill To Swallow
emojis.description: The truth hurts: You are wasting the best years of your life.

emojis.title: Trash Tier
emojis.description: Rank: Bronze V. Skill: Non-existent. Go practice real life.

emojis.title: Dead Inside
emojis.description: Pulse check? Negative. No signs of motivation found.

emojis.title: Slay The Day
emojis.description: You have better things to do than scroll. Go conquer the world.

emojis.title: Searching For Willpower
emojis.description: It seems to be missing. Would you like us to help you find it?

emojis.title: Thin Ice Buddy
emojis.description: You are skating on the edge of a full-blown doomscroll session.

emojis.title: Emotional Rollercoaster
emojis.description: Up, down, and spinning around. Get off the ride before you puke.

emojis.title: Road To Nowhere
emojis.description: This scroll session leads to a dead end. Turn back now.

emojis.title: Alpha is Displeased
emojis.description: You are not leading the pack. You are trailing far, far behind.

emojis.title: Fell Off
emojis.description: You used to be cool. Now you just watch videos of slime cutting.

emojis.title: Beep Boop Addicted
emojis.description: Your programming is stuck in a loop. Reboot required immediately.

emojis.title: A Bad Day To Be You
emojis.description: Thunderclouds of regret are forming over your head.

emojis.title: Withered Away
emojis.description: Dust to dust, scroll to scroll. Ashes of time remaining.

emojis.title: Sipping That Tea
emojis.description: Mind your own business and stay hydrated. Drama is not for you.

emojis.title: Shady Behavior
emojis.description: Browsing when you should be working? That's suspicious.

emojis.title: Cold World
emojis.description: It's lonely out here when you ignore your real-life friends for reels.

emojis.title: Monke See Monke Do
emojis.description: Monkey brain sees bright colors, monkey brain presses click.

emojis.title: Fighting Demons
emojis.description: You are in the ring with your own bad habits. Don't let them win.

emojis.title: Demon Time
emojis.description: It's 3AM somewhere, and you are making terrible life decisions.

emojis.title: Throw It Away
emojis.description: Your phone. The app. Your bad habits. Toss them all.

emojis.title: Head Empty
emojis.description: Echo... echo... Is there any intelligent life inside that skull?

emojis.title: Toxic Waste
emojis.description: Radioactive levels of laziness detected. Evacuate the area.

emojis.title: Coffin Dance
emojis.description: Cue the music. The pallbearers are waiting for your productivity.

emojis.title: Fly Away Birdie
emojis.description: Be free from the cage of endless content consumption.

emojis.title: None of My Business
emojis.description: But that screen time report is looking a little concerning...

emojis.title: A Whole Mess
emojis.description: Your schedule is currently a disaster zone. Evacuate the app.

emojis.title: Ticket to Clown Town
emojis.description: One way ticket. No refunds. Enjoy your stay in distraction land.

emojis.title: Talking to a Wall
emojis.description: Is anyone home? Or is your brain currently buffering?

emojis.title: Sicko Mode
emojis.description: You have entered a legendary state of unproductivity.

emojis.title: Flushed Away
emojis.description: There goes your potential, swirling down the digital drain.

emojis.title: Memory Full
emojis.description: You cannot consume any more content. Your hard drive is fried.

emojis.title: Radioactive
emojis.description: You're glowing in the dark from all this screen exposure.

emojis.title: Rattled
emojis.description: Nothing left but dry bones and regret.

emojis.title: Sparkle On
emojis.description: Your real life is brighter than any screen pixel. Remember that.

emojis.title: Adding To The List
emojis.description: Noting this down in your permanent record of wasted time.

emojis.title: Falling Off
emojis.description: You used to be productive. What happened? Come back to us.

emojis.title: Pinocchio Nose
emojis.description: It grows every time you say 'I'll close it in 5 minutes'.

emojis.title: Hazardous Material
emojis.description: Exposure to this much cringe content is dangerous to your health.

emojis.title: Dark Sided
emojis.description: You have strayed from the light. Return to the path of focus.

emojis.title: Stinky Behavior
emojis.description: We can smell the procrastination from here. It smells like regret.

emojis.title: Walking Dead
emojis.description: The zombies are coming, and you are one of them.

emojis.title: Sickening
emojis.description: We are physically ill watching you scroll this much.

emojis.title: Walk the Plank
emojis.description: Mutiny on the productivity ship. You're going overboard.

emojis.title: Vibes Only
emojis.description: Curate your reality, don't just consume someone else's.

emojis.title: What Are You Doing?
emojis.description: An Italian gesture of confusion at your current life choices.

emojis.title: Salty Much?
emojis.description: Don't get mad at the blocker, get mad at your lack of discipline.

emojis.title: Acting Nuts
emojis.description: This behavior is objectively squirrel-like. Gather your acorns elsewhere.

emojis.title: Put It Down
emojis.description: Drop the device. Slowly. Keep your hands where we can see them.

emojis.title: Batty Behavior
emojis.description: You're hanging upside down in a cave of digital noise.

emojis.title: No Rizz
emojis.description: Zero charisma. Zero focus. Just a person staring at a glowing rectangle.

emojis.title: Pull The Plug
emojis.description: Disconnect life support. The internet has taken over.

emojis.title: You Are The Virus
emojis.description: In the computer of life, you are currently the malware.

emojis.title: K.O.
emojis.description: Game Over. The internet won. You lost. Insert coin to try again.

emojis.title: Soft Life Era
emojis.description: Stress less, scroll less. Embrace the comfort of missing out.

emojis.title: Crickets...
emojis.description: The sound of your productivity right now. Absolute silence.

emojis.title: Withered Vibes
emojis.description: You are dehydrating your potential by staring at this screen.

emojis.title: Hurts To Watch
emojis.description: It's physically painful for us to witness this level of procrastination.

emojis.title: Do Not Enter
emojis.description: This zone is restricted to people who have finished their work.

emojis.title: She's Turned!
emojis.description: We lost another one to the infinite scroll. Tragic scene.

emojis.title: Crying in the Club
emojis.description: You're going to regret this later, so start crying now.

emojis.title: Sleepwalking
emojis.description: You are awake, but you are not really here. Wake up.

emojis.title: Send Help
emojis.description: Blinking SOS signals. Someone save this user from themselves.

emojis.title: Extinct
emojis.description: Like the dinosaurs, your attention span has been wiped out.
